models.title: RAG & LangChain
models.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation framework combining LLMs with enterprise knowledge bases. Applied in consulting operating systems for automated deliverable generation, requirements documentation, and intelligent business analysis workflows.

models.title: XGBoost & Gradient Boosting
models.description: High-performance gradient boosting framework for predictive modeling and classification. Applied in drug response prediction, cancer treatment outcome forecasting, KPI trend analysis, and data-driven business decision support.

models.title: Qlib – Quantitative Modeling
models.description: Microsoft's AI-powered quantitative investment platform for building end-to-end ML pipelines in finance. Applied in algorithmic trading, financial time series forecasting, portfolio optimization, and risk modeling with state-of-the-art deep learning strategies.

models.title: LLaMA 4 Maverick 400B
models.description: Meta's latest open-source large language model with 400 billion parameters, featuring a mixture-of-experts architecture for superior reasoning and multilingual capabilities. Utilized in AI agents for automated document generation, business analysis workflows, and intelligent decision support systems.

models.title: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.description: Google DeepMind's latest multimodal AI model combining vision, language, and advanced reasoning. Applied in real-time analytics dashboards, intelligent automation pipelines, and AI-powered consulting workflows for enterprise decision support.

models.title: Apache Spark MLlib
models.description: Scalable machine learning library for big data processing and distributed analytics. Applied in building end-to-end ML pipelines, large-scale data transformation, business intelligence automation, and enterprise forecasting systems.

models.title: Med-PaLM 2 & Medical LLMs
models.description: Google's medical large language model achieving expert-level performance on clinical reasoning tasks. Applied in personalized oncology treatment prediction, clinical Q&A, and healthcare decision support aligned with FHIR standards.

models.title: MONAI – Medical Imaging AI
models.description: NVIDIA's open-source deep learning framework for medical image analysis including X-ray classification, CT scan interpretation, and radiology workflow optimization. Powers diagnostic assistance and automated reporting in healthcare delivery platforms.

models.title: BioBERT – Biomedical NLP
models.description: Pre-trained biomedical language representation model for mining biomedical text. Applied in clinical document analysis, drug interaction extraction, oncology literature mining, and automated medical terminology processing.
